name: Raoden
description: Prince of Arelon, cursed by the Shaod and cast into Elantris. A natural leader who works to rebuild the fallen city from within.

name: Sarene
description: Princess of Teod, betrothed to Raoden. Sharp-witted, politically astute, and fiercely independent.

name: Hrathen
description: High Priest of Fjorden and Wyrn's gyorn, sent to convert Arelon to Shu-Dereth within three months.

name: Galladon
description: A Dula scholar from Duladen, Raoden's first companion in Elantris. Sardonic but deeply loyal.

name: Karata
description: Leader of one of the gangs within Elantris, former city guard. Fierce protector of the weak.

name: Shaor
description: Feral gang leader within Elantris, surrendered to the pain and madness of the Shaod.

name: Aanden
description: Leader of the most powerful gang in Elantris, obsessed with maintaining his former noble authority.

name: Dashe
description: Member of Karata's group in Elantris, loyal to her cause.

name: Dilaf
description: Hrathen's Arelish arteth, fanatical devotee of Jaddeth with a deep personal hatred of Elantris.

name: Roial
description: Duke of Sarene's circle, the wealthiest noble in Arelon and a shrewd political player.

name: Eondel
description: Count and military commander, loyal member of Sarene's opposition circle.

name: Iadon
description: King of Arelon, Raoden's father. A merchant king who rose to power after Elantris fell.

name: Kiin
description: Sarene's uncle, a powerful cook and former mercenary. Harbors many secrets.

name: Lukel
description: Kiin's son and Sarene's cousin, cheerful merchant and member of the inner circle.

name: Shuden
description: A JinDo nobleman, part of Sarene's political group, known for his grace and Jindo fighting style.

name: Telrii
description: Ambitious Arelish duke bribed by Hrathen to convert and destabilize Arelon's politics.

name: Omin
description: Priest of Shu-Korath, leader of the rival Derethi-opposed religion in Arelon.

name: Seinalan
description: Patriarch of Shu-Korath, Sarene's childhood friend, a high-ranking church official.

name: Eventeo
description: King of Teod, Sarene's father. A steady ruler devoted to his daughter's wellbeing.

name: Ashe
description: Sarene's seon, a sentient Aonic spirit who serves as her companion and messenger.

name: Rayse
description: Original Vessel of the Shard Odium, one of the sixteen who took up a Shard of Adonalsium's power after the Shattering.

name: Tanavast
description: Original Vessel of the Shard Honor, one of the sixteen who took up a Shard of Adonalsium's power after the Shattering.

name: Koravellium Avast
description: Original Vessel of the Shard Cultivation, one of the sixteen who took up a Shard of Adonalsium's power after the Shattering.

name: Ati
description: Original Vessel of the Shard Ruin, one of the sixteen who took up a Shard of Adonalsium's power after the Shattering.

name: Leras
description: Original Vessel of the Shard Preservation, one of the sixteen who took up a Shard of Adonalsium's power after the Shattering.

name: Aona
description: Original Vessel of the Shard Devotion, one of the sixteen who took up a Shard of Adonalsium's power after the Shattering.

name: Skai
description: Original Vessel of the Shard Dominion, one of the sixteen who took up a Shard of Adonalsium's power after the Shattering.

name: Edgli
description: Original Vessel of the Shard Endowment, one of the sixteen who took up a Shard of Adonalsium's power after the Shattering.

name: Bavadin
description: Original Vessel of the Shard Autonomy, one of the sixteen who took up a Shard of Adonalsium's power after the Shattering.

name: Uli Da
description: Original Vessel of the Shard Ambition, one of the sixteen who took up a Shard of Adonalsium's power after the Shattering.

name: Chan Ko Sar
description: Original Vessel of the Shard Invention, one of the sixteen who took up a Shard of Adonalsium's power after the Shattering.

name: Medelantorius
description: Original Vessel of the Shard Valor, one of the sixteen who took up a Shard of Adonalsium's power after the Shattering.

name: Euridrius
description: Original Vessel of the Shard Reason, one of the sixteen who took up a Shard of Adonalsium's power after the Shattering.

name: unknown
description: Original Vessel of the Shard Mercy, one of the sixteen who took up a Shard of Adonalsium's power after the Shattering. Their identity is not yet known.

name: unknown
description: Original Vessel of the Shard Whimsy, one of the sixteen who took up a Shard of Adonalsium's power after the Shattering. Their identity is not yet known.

name: unknown
description: Original Vessel of the Shard Virtuosity, one of the sixteen who took up a Shard of Adonalsium's power after the Shattering. Their identity is not yet known.

name: Hoid
description: One of the co-conspirators against Adonalsium during the Shattering. Did not take up a Shard.

name: Frost
description: Present at the Shattering. Did not take up a Shard; their role is otherwise unknown.

name: Sazed
description: A Terrisman Keeper who becomes the Vessel of Harmony after the Catacendre, holding the combined power of Ruin and Preservation.
